title: Stir Fry with Crispy Turkish Delight
description: A sweet and savory Chinese-inspired stir fry with crispy Turkish Delight and dates.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add onion and bell pepper; stir-fry until tender.
Add garlic and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add dates and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
Add Turkish Delight and stir-fry for 1 minute.
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce and honey.
Pour sauce over stir-fry and toss to coat.
Serve hot, garnished with additional Turkish Delight if desired.
Optional: Serve with steamed rice or noodles.
